audience: Japanese women 18-34, kawaii / pastel aesthetic, soft and cute

sphere.concept: tiny 3D pink sakura candy charm with a cream ribbon bow, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: kawaii glossy candy-plastic, bright cream rim, transparent background, high contrast against pastel pink bg

trump.concept: fluffy chibi strawberry milk character with a happy face, big sparkly eyes
trump.styleNotes: kawaii 3D plush style, pastel pink, glossy, cute, high contrast against pastel pink bg, crisp outline

money.concept: matcha latte cup with a cream foam heart on top
money.styleNotes: soft 3D render, pastel green and cream, glossy ceramic mug, high contrast against pastel pink bg

poop.concept: pastel mochi rabbit dessert with tiny black eyes
poop.styleNotes: soft 3D claymation, pastel pink and white, smooth squishy, high contrast outline so it reads on a pastel bg

cube.concept: single 3D sakura cherry blossom flower with five soft pink petals and a yellow stamen center
cube.styleNotes: glossy 3D, pastel pink and cream, isolated centered, kawaii, transparent background

triangle.concept: tiny three-ball dango skewer in pink, white, and matcha green on a wooden stick
triangle.styleNotes: 3D claymation, pastel cute, isolated centered, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of a pastel Tokyo back alley with light pink cherry blossom petals scattered on tile pavement, vending machine and lantern silhouettes faintly visible
background.styleNotes: soft daylight, painterly, low contrast, pastel pink and mint accents
